RawJson:
[{"orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","ruleId":"dfcc162f7eb44a59ad6752d6ef8ae1a7","ruleName":"Rapid7 Very High Criticality","ruleDescription":"The criticality level labeled as 'Very High' from Rapid7 data connector.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"
    let WizCriticality = Nodes
        | where Properties has 'wizCriticality'
        | extend wizCriticality = toint(Properties.wizAssetInfo.wizCriticality)
        | extend RuleId = case(
            wizCriticality == 0, '6c02786006bc4a5cb05c156eb772f026', //WizVeryHighCriticality
            wizCriticality == 1, 'e3e8a3ee7ec84338b19dbbb420c3857f', //WizHighCriticality
            wizCriticality == 2, '15e8cfc6320147e3b7bfed35d045ca6a', //WizMediumCriticality
            wizCriticality == 3, '1f3d7c3e45fb440cac09ff4cc4d8c145', //WizLowCriticality
            ''
        )
        | where isnotempty(RuleId);
    let Rapid7Criticality = Nodes
        | where Properties has 'rapid7Criticality'
        | extend rapid7Criticality = tostring(Properties.rapid7AssetInfo.rapid7Criticality)
        | extend RuleId = case(
            rapid7Criticality has 'Very High', 'dfcc162f7eb44a59ad6752d6ef8ae1a7', //Rapid7VeryHighCriticality
            rapid7Criticality has 'High', '510a412a418f42ea81a528607ff5e274', //Rapid7HighCriticality
            rapid7Criticality has 'Medium', '7975a163f74f430b9af64212d76dd0ae', //Rapid7MediumCriticality
            rapid7Criticality has 'Low', '776a13cdd575411894310c198d858472', //Rapid7LowCriticality
            ''
        )
        | where isnotempty(RuleId);
    let ServiceNowCriticality = Nodes
        | where Properties has 'serviceNowCriticality'
        | extend serviceNowCriticality = tostring(Properties.serviceNowCmdbAssetInfo.serviceNowCriticality)
        | extend RuleId = case(
            serviceNowCriticality has '1 - most critical', 'c4c3cf6376d745babed4deb46ab3f49a', //ServiceNowHighCriticality
            serviceNowCriticality has '2 - somewhat critical', '2f05290b56444011850ed706ad3ad22e', //ServiceNowMediumCriticality
            serviceNowCriticality has '3 - less critical', '61b69fbaf7994870ba9cd6c9b981a9b7', //ServiceNowLowCriticality
            ''
        )
        | where isnotempty(RuleId);
    let QualysCriticality = Nodes
        | where Properties has 'qualysCriticality'
        | extend qualysCriticality = tostring(Properties.qualysAssetInfo.qualysCriticality)
        | extend RuleId = case(
            qualysCriticality has '5', 'b7dea71248304fffba507f079daa8930', //QualysVeryHighCriticality
            qualysCriticality has '4', '50fce6e983d943e59856544d1d111d81', //QualysHighCriticality
            ''
        )
        | where isnotempty(RuleId);
    let TenableCriticality = Nodes
        | where Properties has 'tenableCriticality'
        | extend tenableCriticality = tostring(Properties.tenableAssetInfo.tenableCriticality)
        | where tenableCriticality has_any ('9', '10')
        | extend RuleId = '44e36f55d89445b79927efdfa529227b';
    WizCriticality
    | union Rapid7Criticality, ServiceNowCriticality, QualysCriticality, TenableCriticality","isDisabled":false,"actions":[{"actionType":"CriticalityLevel","value":0,"creationTime":"0001-01-01T00:00:00"}],"affectedAssetsCount":0,"creationTime":null,"ruleType":"Predefined","criticalityLevel":0,"isDeleted":false,"lastExecutionTime":null,"timestamp":null,"assetType":"Devices","classificationValue":"Rapid7VeryHighCriticality"},{"orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","ruleId":"510a412a418f42ea81a528607ff5e274","ruleName":"Rapid7 High Criticality","ruleDescription":"The criticality level labeled as 'High' from Rapid7 data connector.","createdBy":"","createdByName":null,"lastUpdatedBy":"","lastUpdatedByName":null,"lastUpdateTime":null,"ruleDefinition":null,"kqlQuery":"
    let WizCriticality = Nodes
